title: Victim loses $20,000 to ubank impersonator — scammer posed as fraud team citing unauthorised transaction, obtained card details and OTP codes by phone to drain account.
ASIC and ACCC warn of fake crypto trading platforms on WhatsApp and Telegram groups stealing investor funds.
Victorian man jailed for bulk phone porting scam that hijacked victims' mobile numbers to access bank accounts.
ATO and ASIC issue warning about SMSF scams tricking Australians into illegal early superannuation access.
Scammers impersonate Amazon and YouTube via SMS offering fake work-from-home jobs to steal personal data.
Cybercrime Squad charges trio who allegedly used scam proceeds to purchase gold bullion in money laundering scheme.
Fraudulent ASIC letters claiming bank staff are under investigation trick victims into transferring funds.
2025 Targeting Scams Report reveals Australians lost $2.18 billion across 481,523 scam reports last year.
Criminals impersonate AFP officers using fake ReportCyber reports to steal cryptocurrency and seed phrases.
ASIC removes record 11,964 scam websites in 2025, warns AI is supercharging investment scam threats.
Scamwatch and ACMA issue joint alert on mobile phone fraud as criminals hijack numbers to bypass security.
ASIC warns finfluencers providing unlicensed financial advice face five years imprisonment and million-dollar fines.
PALM scheme seasonal workers targeted by loan scam where fraudsters steal funds after gaining banking access.
